name: agentic-systems-design
description: Agentic Systems Design — Volume 1: Environment & Context Engineering. Engineering the environment an agent acts in and the context it reasons over. Volume 1 of the claude-books Agentic Systems Design series, authored from strict-live research dossiers.

scripts.prebuild: npm run build:bib --if-present && npm run build:labels --if-present && npm run build:tips --if-present && npm run validate --if-present
